summary: Testing completed for M2 PDF Viewer popup and predios functionality. All features verified: 1) PDFViewerModal opens correctly when clicking 'Ver PDF' in historial, 2) /api/resoluciones/finalizar-y-enviar endpoint exists and works correctly, 3) Predios created by M2 have status 'aprobado' and are searchable in /api/predios
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: PDFViewerModal component at /app/frontend/src/components/PDFViewerModal.jsx correctly implements popup with Download, Print, Send Email, and Open in Tab buttons
VERIFIED: PDF opens in popup (iframe) not new window - Lines 928-943 and 2090-2102 in MutacionesResoluciones.js use setPdfViewerData and setShowPDFViewer(true)
VERIFIED: Historial tab shows 'Ver PDF' button for each resolution with pdf_path - Lines 3472-3491 in MutacionesResoluciones.js
VERIFIED: /api/resoluciones/finalizar-y-enviar endpoint at line 26149 in server.py - updates petition status to 'finalizado' and sends email with PDF attached
VERIFIED: Predios created by M2 have status 'aprobado' and are searchable via /api/predios - Found predio 540030101000001240009 with status 'aprobado'

success_rate.frontend: 100% (PDF popup, Ver PDF button, email button all verified)

context_for_next_testing_agent: M2 PDF viewer and predios functionality fully tested. Key findings: 1) PDF viewer modal (PDFViewerModal.jsx) opens in popup with iframe, has Download/Print/Email/OpenTab buttons, 2) Historial shows 37 resoluciones with 'Ver PDF' button, 3) /api/resoluciones/finalizar-y-enviar finalizes tramite and sends email, 4) M2 predios have status 'aprobado' and appear in Gestión de Predios

backend_api_tests.historial_has_m2_resoluciones: PASS - Multiple M2 type resoluciones found
backend_api_tests.pdf_file_accessible: PASS - PDF files accessible via HTTP (Content-Type: application/pdf)

frontend_ui_tests.ver_pdf_button: PASS - Button visible for each resolution
frontend_ui_tests.m2_badge_in_historial: PASS - M2 badges visible in historial list

features_verified: 1. PDFViewerModal component opens as popup (not new window) when generating M2 resolution
2. Historial de resoluciones shows 'Ver PDF' button that opens PDFViewerModal popup
3. PDFViewerModal has buttons: Abrir en pestaña, Imprimir, Enviar por correo, Descargar PDF
4. /api/resoluciones/finalizar-y-enviar endpoint works - updates tramite to 'finalizado' and sends email with PDF
5. Predios created by M2 have status 'aprobado' and appear in /api/predios search results
6. PDF files are stored in /app/frontend/public/resoluciones/ and accessible via HTTP
